name: Promo Grid
description: Responsive grid for two to six Promo Cards. Cards stack on mobile and expand to the selected desktop column count.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Promo Grid
attribute_definition_groups.description: Responsive grid for two to six Promo Cards. Cards stack on mobile and expand to the selected desktop column count.

attribute_definitions.name: Title
attribute_definitions.description: Optional accessible heading shown above the cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Subtitle
attribute_definitions.description: Optional supporting copy shown below the heading.

attribute_definitions.name: Desktop columns
attribute_definitions.description: Cards always stack on mobile and use two columns on tablet before this desktop layout.

attribute_definitions.name: Surface
attribute_definitions.description: Semantic storefront surface applied to the complete section.
